brand.name: Merchant
brand.description: Your Integrated System for Customer Balance & Loyalty

slides.title: Turn Your Local Shop into a Smart Store
slides.subtitle: Tqdr Plus helps you manage customer balances and increase loyalty through a fully integrated digital system.

slides.title: Fully Encrypted Financial System
slides.subtitle: We use the latest encryption technologies to protect your customers' data and financial operations 24/7.

slides.title: Double Profits via Customer Loyalty
slides.subtitle: Customers with balances in your shop return to buy 3 times more often than others.

slides.title: Simple Interface Managed via Mobile
slides.subtitle: No need for complex devices, manage all operations and add customers directly from your smartphone.

stats.title: Kingdom's Largest Loyalty Network
stats.subtitle: We take pride in supporting thousands of merchants and millions of customers.

customer_features.title: Easier & Smarter Shopping
customer_features.subtitle: Save money and track your balances in your favorite stores via one secure platform.

features.title: Balance Tracking
features.desc: Monitor every penny in your balance at all stores at a glance.

features.title: Continuous Savings
features.desc: Benefit from exclusive discounts and offers available only to balance holders.

features.title: Financial Security
features.desc: Your rights are protected and secured with the latest digital encryption.

shop_features.title: Pro Tools for Shop Growth
shop_features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage customer relations and loyalty in one platform.

features.title: CRM
features.desc: Full record for each customer, their transactions, and preferences.

features.title: Growth Reports
features.desc: Charts illustrating your business development and monthly performance.

features.title: Liquidity Management
features.desc: Full control over cash flow and deposited balances.

features.title: Loyalty System
features.desc: Advanced tools to ensure customers return for more purchases.

features.title: Gift Cards
features.desc: Ability to send special offers to the most loyal customers.

features.title: Mobile Management
features.desc: Integrated app allowing you to manage your business from anywhere.
